name: ilovepdf API
description: ilovepdf API — REST API for PDF merging, splitting, compressing, conversion, and OCR processing.

seo.title: ilovepdf API — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: ilovepdf API: ilovepdf API — REST API for PDF merging, splitting, compressing, conversion, and OCR processing.

when_to_use: Merging, splitting, and compressing PDFs via REST API
PDF to Word/Excel conversion in document processing pipelines
OCR-based text extraction from scanned PDF documents
Batch PDF operations for high-volume document workflows
Adding PDF editing capabilities to SaaS apps via API

pros: Trusted consumer brand with big user base
cons: API quality lags newer dev-first rivals
Rate limits unclear on lower tiers
No webhook system for async jobs
review.verdict: Swiss-army PDF API wrapping their consumer tools — broad but shallow, fine for cost-sensitive use.
review.best_for: Apps needing many PDF operations (merge/split/OCR) with one vendor and modest volumes.
review.not_for: Teams prioritizing developer experience and modern APIs.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
